visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a teal hoodie and black pants, squats and then collapses flat on her back onto a light-colored wood-textured floor. The room is a large, empty, modern apartment with built-in tan cabinetry and warm recessed ceiling lighting. (2) The scene cuts to a well-lit walk-in closet filled with racks of colorful clothing. The woman is seen stuffing a teal garment into a large black gym bag. Her expression is focused as she moves her hands quickly to hide the item from any potential observers. (3) In a brightly lit office setting, the woman stands behind three coworkers who are sitting and eating. She reaches over to grab a piece of food from a container while the others are distracted by their own conversation and snacks, moving with stealthy gestures. (4) The woman is crouched near a low wooden shelf filled with various packaged snacks. She hurriedly grabs multiple items, including bags of chips and crackers, and shoves them into her large black bag, looking around quickly as if checking for witnesses in the office area. (5) A close-up shot shows the woman in front of a mirror, likely in a bathroom or vanity area. She is carefully applying a pinkish-brown liquid lipstick to her lips. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting her focused facial expression and precise hand movements. (6) The camera moves to a top-down view of a white drawer filled with numerous skincare and cosmetic bottles. The woman's hands enter the frame, picking up several items and placing them into her black bag positioned on the floor nearby in a hurried manner. (7) At a silver and white water dispenser, the woman is seen filling a large clear plastic bottle. She glances sideways with a wary expression. The background shows a neutral-toned office kitchen area with a refrigerator and wooden shelving units against a beige wall. (8) Crouching on a marble-patterned floor next to a white wall, the woman plugs a multi-socket power strip into an outlet. She appears startled, looking toward the camera as if someone has just appeared, her eyes wide and mouth slightly open in surprise. (9) In a public restroom stall, the woman quickly grabs a full roll of white toilet paper from a metal holder. She stuffs it into her black bag and exits the stall hurriedly, her body tilted forward in a swift, frantic motion to escape. (10) Standing at a gray stone sink with a black faucet, the woman takes a single piece of toilet paper and meticulously peels it into two thin layers. She uses one layer to wipe her nose, demonstrating extreme frugality in a modern bathroom environment.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: POV:用盡全力買房裝潢後. (2) [Subtitle]: 衣服，公司的. (3) [Subtitle]: 三餐，同事的. (4) [Subtitle]: 零食，公司的. (5) [Subtitle]: 化妝品，公司的. (6) [Subtitle]: 公關品，公司的. (7) [Subtitle]: 水，公司的. (8) [Subtitle]: 羅靜欲. (9) [Subtitle]: 電，公司的. (10) [Subtitle]: 衛生紙，公司的. (11) [Subtitle]: 衛生紙，正確的使用方法. (12) [Subtitle]: 這還可以用.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 4 female coworkers visible in the office snack scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long dark hair and bangs, wearing an oversized teal hoodie, black wide-leg pants, and thick-soled black shoes.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An empty modern apartment with neutral cabinets, a walk-in closet, a professional office space, and a clean public restroom.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic-pop BGM starts immediately with a bright synth melody and a steady 4/4 electronic drum beat. No vocals are present. The acoustic texture is clean and studio-produced with no ambient noise. (2) BGM continues with a consistent rhythmic structure. A subtle, low-frequency rustling sound occurs as fabric is handled during the closet scene. The vocal track remains silent while the music maintains its energetic tonality. (3) Ambient office sounds of very low-volume chatter and percussive chewing noises are layered over the continuous BGM. The music's intensity remains moderate and doesn't duck for the background environmental sounds. (4) High-frequency plastic crinkling sounds are prominent, indicating bags being moved. The BGM remains the primary acoustic signal with a clear, rhythmic bassline and sharp high-hat hits occurring every beat. (5) A distinct mechanical 'click' sound with short spectral bandwidth is heard as a cap is opened. The BGM continues its repetitive loop with bright, compressed high-end frequencies and a stable harmonic bed. (6) BGM maintains its upbeat tempo. No new significant sound effects are introduced in this phase, preserving the energetic, consistent musical environment as the primary focus of the audio mix. (7) A mid-frequency splashing sound of liquid being poured into a bottle is clearly audible over the music. The BGM's volume remains steady, and the spectral brightness of the track is high. (8) A sudden, loud male voice yells a name with high vocal arousal and a sharp rising intonation. This transient vocal event interrupts the musical flow and introduces a temporary acoustic peak. (9) Fast-paced footsteps and the metallic creak of a door hinge are heard, followed by the percussive sound of paper being pulled. The BGM continues steadily behind these real-world incidental sound events. (10) The BGM volume ducks slightly as a female voice speaks a short sentence with low intensity and calm prosody. The sound of thin paper tearing is faintly audible in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To humorously depict the extreme frugality and 'office theft' lifestyle of someone who has spent all their money on buying and renovating a house, using a montage of relatable (if exaggerated) behaviors.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No specific brand is promoted; the items shown are generic or used as props for the skit's narrative.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A fast-paced comedy skit relying on quick cuts and situational humor about post-purchase poverty.
